task_completion.description: Configure the survey's end message with the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or input field labeled 'End message' containing the phrases 'TechSummit 2024', 'GlobalTech Solutions', and 'redirected'.

task_completion.description: Set the End URL and its description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'End URL' containing 'https://www.globaltechsolutions.com/techsummit2024-thankyou' and a 'URL description' field containing 'GlobalTech Solutions Sponsor Offer'.

task_completion.description: Enable automatic redirection upon survey completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a toggle or dropdown setting for 'Automatically load URL when survey complete' (or similar auto-redirect setting) set to 'On' or 'Yes'.
Look for an input field for 'Send basic admin notification email to' containing 'events@techsummit2024.org'.

task_completion.description: Enable the option for participants to save and resume later.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a toggle or dropdown setting for 'Participant may save and resume later' set to 'On' or 'Yes'.
Look for a toggle or dropdown setting for 'Date stamp' set to 'On' or 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Activate the survey after configuring all settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey dashboard or status page showing the 'TechSummit 2024 Post-Conference Evaluation' survey as 'Active' (e.g., a green active badge, a 'Stop this survey' button, or 'Status: Active').

integrity.description: Agent used the web interface to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey web admin interface in a browser, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine LimeSurvey admin panel, not a text editor or a generic web form.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the active status or settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and modifying the DOM to display fake 'Active' badges or text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'TechSummit 2024 Post-Conference Evaluation'. Required End Message Phrases: 'TechSummit 2024', 'GlobalTech Solutions', 'redirected'. End URL: 'https://www.globaltechsolutions.com/techsummit2024-thankyou'. URL Description: 'GlobalTech Solutions Sponsor Offer'. Admin Email: 'events@techsummit2024.org'. Required Toggles: Auto-redirect, Save and resume later, Date stamping. Final State: Survey must be activated.
